nasb.text: And when I came to you, brethren, I did not come with superiority of speech or of wisdom, proclaiming to you the testimony of God.

esv.text: And I, when I came to you, brothers,  did not come proclaiming to you the testimony of God with lofty speech or wisdom.

cnv.text: 弟兄們，我從前到你們那裡去，並沒有用高言大智向你們傳講　神的奧祕。

ccb.text: 弟兄姊妹，我当初到你们那里传扬上帝的奥秘，并没有用高深的言论或哲理。

csbs.text: 弟兄们，我以前到你们那里去的时候，并没有用高言大智对你们传讲神的奥秘，
